calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Josh Davis appeared by zoom for Patrick Liu (executor).

Mr. Davis stated that no one has previously been confined/incarcerated, and that he talked to the heirs about this issue. The Petition to Terminate Estate (no assets) is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Continued To Apr-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 3, 2017 is admitted to probate. Patrick Liu is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
